query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: UK Petrol Prices Hit Highest Level Since 2022
articles.description: UK petrol prices have reached their highest level since December 2022 as renewed US-Iran tensions pushed oil back toward $100 per barrel.
